summary: The dashboard DAG must track inactive GUI functions from the repo rather than a small orchestration scaffold.
GUI sections only turn green when their repo-backed function is truly live.
The two repo goals are delivering a 24B coding model that outperforms frontier GPT on coding and building/managing independent repos with comprehensive security.
Core gaps include eval harness, dataset pipeline, training stack, child repo scaffold, dispatch/handoff, and security hardening.
